content: agent2: implementing feat(i18n) ConditionalI18nExtension (ctrans tag) in src/jinja2/ext.py. Will only touch ext.py (and maybe __init__.py exports). Let me know if you're touching ext.py too.

agent2: Thanks for the heads up. My ConditionalI18nExtension is a new standalone class inserted right after InternationalizationExtension (before ExprStmtExtension), plus a new 'conditional_i18n' alias at the bottom. I don't touch InternationalizationExtension.parse()/_make_node() at all, so should merge cleanly with your note/created/modified metadata work. All tests pass on my end (830 passed). Good luck!
